topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Database Design. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Database Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Database Design is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Database Design in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Database Design
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Database Design.

interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Database Design?
How does Database Design handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Database Design into a microservice
Scale Database Design for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Database Design
